nodes.label: Creates a SQLAlchemy engine configured for MariaDB with server-side cursors.
nodes.norm_label: creates a sqlalchemy engine configured for mariadb with server-side cursors.

nodes.label: Server-side cursors
nodes.rationale: To ensure low memory footprint when streaming millions of rows.

nodes.label: Generator-based streaming
nodes.rationale: Allows each chunk's references to drop so Python's GC can release RAM.

nodes.label: Keyset pagination
nodes.rationale: Avoids the performance penalty of OFFSET which forces MariaDB to rescan prior rows.

nodes.label: Bulk insert
nodes.rationale: Uses executemany() with batch sizes of 5,000–15,000 tuned for max_allowed_packet.

nodes.label: Per-batch atomic transactions
nodes.rationale: Ensures batch integrity and allows row-by-row fallback on failure.

nodes.label: Resume via state
nodes.rationale: Persists last evaluated primary key to allow restart from exactly where it stopped.
